title: calcicola sericea
intro: Calcicola sericea, also known as the woolly sea sandwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family and is typically found in coastal areas with sandy soils. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. Calcicola sericea has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Calcicola sericea are made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
